hero.title: Welcome to wudcx's Blog
hero.subtitle: Recording programming learning, technical exploration and project practice

nvim.title: Getting Started with Neovim
nvim.description: Neovim is a modern Vim fork. This guide walks you through configuring and using nvim from scratch, including plugin management, basic operations, and LSP integration.

opencode.title: Learning OpenCode Tutorial
opencode.description: OpenCode is a powerful AI programming assistant. This tutorial covers its core features, usage tips, and practical cases to help you get started quickly.

cpp.title: C++ Interview Questions
cpp.description: Common C++ interview topics including OOP, memory management, STL containers, and algorithms with detailed explanations.

about.title: About Me
about.description1: I am a developer passionate about technology, focusing on full-stack development and AI tool applications. Through this blog, I share my learning experiences in technology.
about.description2: My tech stack includes: JavaScript/TypeScript, React, Node.js, Python, and C++.
